title: × malvalthaea heterophylla
intro: × Malvalthaea heterophylla, also known as the hybrid hibiscus, is a unique plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The plant's leaves and flowers can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to reap its medicinal benefits. Additionally, × Malvalthaea heterophylla is sometimes used in skincare products due to its potential to soothe and calm irritated skin.
